1.content:
## Host Page Fault Rate
Drilldown of Grafana **Total Hard Page Faults**. Uses OneAgent `dt.host.memory.avail.pfps` (page faults/s, one line per host). Grafana sources the same signal from Prometheus `node_vmstat_pgmajfault`. Aggregated: **Spark System Metrics**.

2.title: Page Fault Rate by Host (major and minor faults, faults/s)
2.query:
timeseries pf=avg(dt.host.memory.avail.pfps), by:{dt.entity.host}
| fieldsAdd host=entityName(dt.entity.host)
| filter in(host, "Lab1", "Lab2", "Lab3")
| fieldsRemove dt.entity.host
